titleStmt.title: SII 9.150: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 150. (A.R. No. 565 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE KAILASAPPA-GUTTA (A HILL) AT KONAKONDLA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 6, Durmati, Pushya, ba. 6, Bṛihavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1081 December 23, Thursday, f.d.t. ·43. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Poṭṭaḷakeṟe and mentions the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyimayyarasa as ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. It records that, for the service of the Jaina god in the basadi called Chaṭṭa-Jinālaya erected by Nālikabbe in memory of her husband in Koṇḍakundeya-tīrtha, Jōyimayyarasa made a grant of 30 mattars of land, a flower garden, an oil-mill and 8 house sites.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī svasti . samastabhuvanāśra
ya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ sa
luttamire poṭṭaḷakeṟeya nelevīḍinoḷu sukasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyye tatpādapadmōpajīvi sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaNḍaḷēśvaranahi
tamaṁḍaḷikamadanamardanamahēśvaraṁ nijaku
ḷakuvaḷayasudhākaraṁ vineyaratnākaraṁ saṇasuma
ṇḍaḷikataleyakaravattanabhinavacārudattanoḍḍu
ṇḍagaṇḍu suttabaḷasuva maṇḍaḷikara maṇḍeyanaḍeva
maṟevuge kāvaṁ viṣamaturagārūḍha
prauḍharēvantanahitakritāntaṁ śrīmalli
kāryyanadēvalabdhavaraprasādanu
bhayabaḷaraṇācāryyanacaḷitadhairyya
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapēśaṇagaruḍa
nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōyimayyarasarssindavā
ḍi sāsiramumaṁ bīḷavrittiyiṁ tribhōgābhyanta
rasuddhiyanāḷuttamire nālikabbe taṁna bhartthāraṁge koṁḍa
kuṁdeya tīrtthadalu caṭṭajināleyameṁdu parōkṣavina
yadiṁ māḍisida basadige mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
jōyimayyarasarccāḷukyavikramakāḷa 6 ne
ya durmmatisaṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 6 brihavāra
daṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti nimityadi caṭṭajināleyada dē
varaṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphaṭikanivēdyamahāradānakkaṁ
pāvuḍakkaṁ kiṟiyakoṇḍakuṁdeyalkariyūra baṭṭeyiṁ pa
ḍuva biṭṭa kariyanelaṁ mattavirpattanālku Aṁkadoḷaṁ
matta 24 nivēdyakke biṭṭa nēṟilakeṟeyalli mūḍa kisu
mattarāṟu Aṁkadi matta 6 Aṁtu biṭṭa matta mū
vattu pūvinatōṇṭaṁ mattarondu gāṇapoṁdu maneya nivēṣa
ṇaveṁṭu yī dharmmama pratipāḷisidaṁgakṣayapuṇyavidana
ḷidaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ kavileyuma brā
hmaṇarumanaḷida pāpaṁ sārggu . sāmānyaṁ dharmaśētu
rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētā
bhāgini pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
caṁdraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētvasundharā ṣaṣṭi
rvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
